author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fixed all 41 QA issues. FSDP gradient flow restored (full_params stored for backward, reduce-scatter). JIT fusion restricted to unary chains (diamond reverted). no_grad/enable_grad panic-safe. DataLoader prefetch thread panic propagation. Profiler push_gpu_event returns Option. All loss outputs on correct device. NLLLoss negative target validation. MHA bias gradients differentiable. 1,608 tests pass.
